name: Clam Stuffed Mushroom Caps
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Mushrooms, 1-1½ to 2 inches in diameter
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Remove mushroom stems and dice them.
3. Dip the mushroom caps in butter and place, rounded side down, on a rack on a cookie sheet. Drain.
4. Reserve clam liquid.
5. In the melted butter, sauté the diced mushroom stems and minced garlic.
6. Add the reserved clam liquid to the pan and simmer until the mushroom stems are tender.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients: bread crumbs, parsley, salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
8. Spoon the mixture into each mushroom cap.
9. Broil the stuffed mushrooms about 6 inches from the heat for about 8 minutes, or until the mushrooms are tender and the tops are lightly browned.
10. Sprinkle a few drops of lemon juice on top before serving hot.
